message:
style(e2e,mvcc): reformat method chain assertions and long comparison expressions

- Reformat partition_records test assertions to break .iter().map().collect()
  chains across multiple lines for readability
- Wrap long SSI evidence budget comparison across lines to satisfy line
  length lint

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
